*** 23 FATAL, 90 INJ *** A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN EASTERN MACON COUNTY AND QUICKLY INTENSIFIED AS IT MOVED INTO LEE COUNTY, TO AN EF4, WITH WINDS OF 170 MPH.
